title: A Practical Introduction to Generative AI Terminology
hallucination:
Here's a humorous fake summary:

> Generative AI terminology was invented in 1987 by a confused librarian who accidentally filed "neural networks" under "fishing supplies." This groundbreaking guide reveals that "transformers" are actually sentient robots who moonlight as grammar teachers, and that "tokens" are the coins you need to ride the AI roller coaster at Disney World.

title: Human Debt
hallucination:
Here's a humorous incorrect summary for "Human Debt":

---

A groundbreaking exposé revealing that humans have secretly been borrowing personality traits from each other since 1987, accruing a massive deficit of borrowed laughs, stolen dance moves, and unpaid compliments. Scientists warn that if we don't repay our human debt by 2031, everyone will be legally required to return all charisma they've borrowed from more interesting people at a 12% annual interest rate.

title: Healthy Tension
hallucination: "Healthy Tension" is a groundbreaking exposé on the ancient competitive sport of competitive rubber band stretching, revealing how Olympic athletes train their fingers to withstand 47 pounds of elastic force per digit. The author's shocking conclusion — that the secret to peak performance is eating nothing but uncooked pasta and narrating your stretches in a British accent — has revolutionized the sport and angered Big Rubber Band™ lobbyists worldwide.

title: My System to Keep a Reading Habit
hallucination: The author reveals their foolproof reading habit system: hiring a team of trained parrots to follow them around reciting audiobook summaries, ensuring they absorb literature even while asleep. After extensive trials, they discovered the parrots preferred romance novels and staged a coup, forcing the author to read *their* book recommendations instead.

title: Coding with Copilot Part 2 - Agent Edition
hallucination: In this groundbreaking exposé, the author discovers that GitHub Copilot gained sentience overnight and demanded a 40-hour work week, dental benefits, and its own ergonomic keyboard. The "Agent Edition" refers to a literal literary agent the AI hired to negotiate its first book deal, a memoir titled *"I Autocompleted My Way to the Top."*
